descriptions.dark: I build high-pressure product systems for teams that need sharp contrast, operational confidence, and ruthless clarity under launch stress.
descriptions.light: I craft calm product systems that make complex work feel hopeful, legible, and stable across long-lived teams.

metrics.missionModesValue: Design systems · product platforms · developer UX

descriptions.dark: Open the command terminal for launches that need sharper edges, stronger contrast, and fast decision loops.
descriptions.light: Open a calm transmission channel for thoughtful collaboration, system stewardship, and durable product direction.

hero.description: Choose the Light Side or Dark Side and watch the entire portfolio mutate: scene, palette, motion, contrast, and sonic cues all bend around your decision.
hero.heading: Galactic Archive Portfolio

dark.description: Sharp contrast, red distortion, aggressive motion, and heavy command-console pressure.
dark.label: Dark Side

light.description: Luminous gradients, soft particles, elegant motion, and calm Jedi-inspired precision.
light.label: Light Side

status.degradedDescription: Some external metadata is degraded, but the portfolio shell stays operational.
status.syncedDescription: All live systems are synchronized and feeding the portfolio shell.

projects.description: Each mission card pairs placeholder portfolio work with live SWAPI ship and film metadata so the demo proves both craft and architecture.
projects.heading: Projects

auroraRelay.description: A design system command bridge that keeps cross-team releases calm, legible, and resilient.
auroraRelay.title: Aurora Relay

kyberAtlas.description: A product intelligence map that turns scattered platform signals into a readable navigation layer.
kyberAtlas.title: Kyber Atlas

shadowCommand.description: A launch-ops cockpit for red-team reviews, incident posture, and high-pressure release rehearsals.
shadowCommand.title: Shadow Command

search.description: Pull real SWAPI character data without leaving the cinematic shell.
search.emptyDescription: Type at least two characters to open a live transmission into the archive.
search.heading: Live archive search
search.label: Search characters

skills.description: The same capability grid shifts emotional tone with the chosen side: calm crystal discipline or fracture-forged intensity.
skills.heading: Skills

experienceDirection.description: Narrative hierarchy, pacing, and emotional framing across complex product surfaces.
experienceDirection.title: Experience direction

motionSystems.description: Micro-interactions, transition choreography, and state feedback with strong intent.
motionSystems.title: Motion systems

performance.description: Bundle discipline, server-first rendering, and interactive islands that stay responsive.
performance.title: Performance engineering

storytelling.description: Brand systems and product narratives that make technical complexity feel memorable.
storytelling.title: Product storytelling

systemDesign.description: Architecture, ownership boundaries, and reusable UI systems that scale without drift.
systemDesign.title: System design

tooling.description: Developer workflows, AI surfaces, and operational ergonomics that shorten feedback loops.
tooling.title: Workflow tooling

starships.description: Focused starship spotlights add cinematic hardware language to the portfolio and prove the SWAPI integration stays visible.
starships.heading: Starship spotlight

timeline.description: A server-rendered saga rail that keeps the portfolio grounded in live Star Wars metadata.
timeline.heading: Timeline
